company_domain.description: Primary domain of the target account to analyze, e.g., 'acmefinancial.com'

company_name.description: Human-readable company name to improve search quality

your_product_category.description: The category of your product — used to focus competitive research on the relevant space. E.g., 'financial close automation', 'incident management platform', 'revenue intelligence'.

known_competitors.description: Optional list of competitor product names to include in targeted searches. If provided, research will investigate these specifically in addition to open-ended discovery.
